questions.question: Which data type stores true or false values in TypeScript?
questions.hint: It has only two possible values.

questions.question: What keyword is used to define a constant in JavaScript?
Which React hook is used for side effects?
questions.hint: It runs after render and can depend on values.

questions.question: In an Nx monorepo, which folder typically stores reusable code shared by apps?
What does JSON stand for?
questions.hint: It is a text format often used for APIs and config.
